nasb.text: and stooping and looking in, he *saw the linen wrappings lying there; but he did not go in.

esv.text: And stooping to look in, he saw the linen cloths lying there, but he did not go in.

cnv.text: 屈身向裡面觀看，看見細麻布還在那裡，但他卻沒有進去。

ccb.text: 他并没有进去，只是探头往里看，看见细麻布还在那里。

csbs.text: 他弯腰去看，见那细麻布条放在那里，不过他没有进去。
